group_invitations_contact_check.name: group_invitations_contact_check
group_invitations_contact_check.value: "group_invitations"."email" is not null or "group_invitations"."handle" is not null

recipe_ingredients_quantity_range_check.name: recipe_ingredients_quantity_range_check
recipe_ingredients_quantity_range_check.value: "recipe_ingredients"."quantity_max" is null or "recipe_ingredients"."quantity" is null or "recipe_ingredients"."quantity_max" >= "recipe_ingredients"."quantity"

shopping_list_items_quantity_range_check.name: shopping_list_items_quantity_range_check
shopping_list_items_quantity_range_check.value: "shopping_list_items"."quantity_max" is null or "shopping_list_items"."quantity" is null or "shopping_list_items"."quantity_max" >= "shopping_list_items"."quantity"
